tasks.subject: Task 1: Download Button Reveal — HTML, CSS, and JS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the download button appear with primary accent color and a scale-bounce animation after the donation countdown ends.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (line ~118 — #download anchor tag)
- Modify: `style.css` (append after .btn rules, around line 356)
- Modify: `app.js` (inside startDonationCountdown(), unlock block around line 76-79)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] #download has class `btn` only (not `btn secondary`) in HTML source
- [ ] @keyframes btn-reveal defined: 0% scale(0.85) opacity(0), 60% scale(1.05), 100% scale(1.0) opacity(1)
- [ ] .btn--reveal applies animation btn-reveal 0.4s ease-out forwards
- [ ] JS: btn--reveal removed, reflow forced, btn--reveal re-added each time countdown completes
- [ ] Generating a second PDF replays the animation
- [ ] Download button is lila/indigo (same as PDF erzeugen button) when visible

**Verify:** Open index.html in browser. Load PDF, select preset, click generate. After 5 s countdown: download button bounces in with indigo color. Generate again: animation replays.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css", "app.js"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html — manual browser test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["#download class is btn only", "@keyframes btn-reveal defined with correct keyframes", ".btn--reveal applies 0.4s animation", "animation replays on second generation"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
